data.raceComments: {"comment":"9. LADY THINKABELL finished fifth of nine at Ballarat last start after having finished in the money in both of her previous runs. Racing in good form she is a leading chance. 5. SOMEWHERE SOON missed the placings two runs back then was always well out of her ground last start when finishing sixth over 1900m at Oakbank. Should find this line-up easier and is in the mix. 4. ALAINGE was unplaced two runs back then again failed to fire last start over 2150m at Oakbank. The engagement of Sairyn Fawke is a positive move. Racing over a longer trip looks well placed to return to top-three form. 3. EMPRESS OF THE SUN finished out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start over 2100m at Sandown-Lakeside, finishing sixth after racing on the speed into the turn. Likely improver with strong each-way claims.","runners":[9,5,4,3],"exclusive":true}
